en: When ascending or descending ladders, employees must be able to hold on securely at all times. Objects carried must not impair safe handhold.\nWork Equipment Ordinance, Section 34(2)(1)

Ladders must be positioned securely and, where necessary, secured against slipping, tipping, or shifting during use. The stability of ladders must be ensured before use.\nWork Equipment Ordinance, Section 36(1)(1)\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 89(7)
Roof ladders may only be used on roofs with an inclination of up to 75 degrees and must be secured against displacement.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 89(7)

Where there is an increased risk of falling, additional safety measures must be implemented, including securing the ladder or providing suitable fall protection where required.\nWork Equipment Ordinance, Section 36(7-8)
Additional Protection for Work at Height
